headline: Disney And Apple Almost Merged, Here's Why The Deal Didn't Work
summary: Media giant Walt Disney Co has grown through acquisitions of several media companies under the previous leadership of CEO Bob Iger. The company may have looked significantly different if one or two proposed deals had happened. Disney Almost Merged With...
